name: Venice Beach Skate Park
description: Venice Beach Skate Park is an iconic oceanfront skate park in Los Angeles, California. Features a historic bowl, street course, and stunning Pacific Ocean views. A legendary destination for skaters of all levels.

name: Burnside Skatepark
description: Burnside Skatepark is a legendary DIY skate park under the Burnside Bridge in Portland, Oregon. Built by skaters in 1990, it features massive concrete bowls and is considered one of the most influential skateparks ever built.

name: FDR Skatepark
description: FDR Skatepark is a famous DIY skatepark under I-95 in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Built and maintained by local skaters since the 1990s, it features extensive concrete structures including bowls, banks, and street sections.

name: Louisville Extreme Park
description: Louisville Extreme Park is one of the largest free public skateparks in the US, located along the Ohio River waterfront. Features 40,000 sq ft of skating terrain including bowls, ramps, and street elements.

name: Denver Skate Park
description: Denver Skate Park is a premier 60,000 sq ft public skate facility under I-25 near downtown Denver, Colorado. One of the largest covered skateparks in the US with bowls, street courses, and all-weather skating.

name: Lake Cunningham Regional Skate Park
description: Lake Cunningham Regional Skate Park is one of the largest skateparks in the US at 68,000 sq ft. Located in San Jose, California, it features world-class bowls, a street course, and a flow park.

name: Paine's Park
description: Paine's Park is a 30,000 sq ft public skate park on the Benjamin Franklin Parkway in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Features a bowl, street course, and is located near the Philadelphia Museum of Art.

name: Skatepark of Tampa
description: The Skatepark of Tampa (SPoT) is a world-famous indoor skatepark and skate shop in Tampa, Florida. Host of the annual Tampa Pro and Tampa Am contests, featuring a full street course and bowls.

name: Chicago Burnham Bowl
description: Chicago Burnham Bowl is a public skatepark in Grant Park near Millennium Park in downtown Chicago, Illinois. Features a bowl, street course, and beginner-friendly areas open to all ages.

name: Ed Benedict Skate Park
description: Ed Benedict Skate Park is a popular public skatepark in Portland, Oregon. Features a street-style plaza with ledges, rails, stairs, and a smooth concrete surface ideal for technical skating.

name: Encinitas YMCA Skate Park
description: Encinitas YMCA Skate Park is one of the most famous skateparks in the world, built in 1978. Located in Encinitas, California, it features the original 9-foot square pool and a 9-foot kidney pool.

name: Converse Skate Park
description: Converse Skate Park is a popular public skatepark in Santa Ana, California. Features a street plaza, bowls, and beginner areas suitable for skaters of all skill levels.

name: Albuquerque Civic Plaza Skate Park
description: Albuquerque Civic Plaza Skate Park is a major public skatepark in Albuquerque, New Mexico. Features over 20,000 sq ft of concrete skating surface including a bowl, street course, and flow section.

name: Las Vegas Skate Park
description: Las Vegas Skate Park is a large public outdoor skatepark in Las Vegas, Nevada. Features concrete bowls, a street course, and rails open to all ages and skill levels.

name: Phoenix Desert West Skate Park
description: Phoenix Desert West Skate Park is a 36,000 sq ft outdoor public skatepark in Phoenix, Arizona. Features bowls, a street course, and multiple terrain types for all skill levels.

name: Seattle Center Skate Park
description: Seattle Center Skate Park is a public skatepark located at the Seattle Center campus near the Space Needle in Seattle, Washington. Features a street-style plaza with ledges and rails.

name: Provo Skate Park
description: Provo Skate Park is a large public outdoor skatepark in Provo, Utah. Features over 25,000 sq ft of skating surface including bowls, a street course, and a mini ramp.

name: Austin Pease Park Skate Spot
description: Austin Pease Park Skate Spot is a popular public skate feature in Pease Park, Austin, Texas. Features street-style skating terrain with ledges, rails, and an open plaza.

name: Houston Burnett Skate Park
description: Houston Burnett Skate Park is a 30,000 sq ft public outdoor skatepark in Houston, Texas. Features a bowl, street plaza, and beginner zones in a scenic park setting.

name: Dallas Samuell Grand Skate Park
description: Dallas Samuell Grand Skate Park is a public outdoor skatepark in Dallas, Texas. Features concrete bowls, a street course, and rails for skaters of all levels.

name: Atlanta Krog Street Skate Park
description: Atlanta Krog Street Skate Park is an urban public skatepark located in the Inman Park neighborhood of Atlanta, Georgia. Features a street-style layout with ledges, rails, and a small bowl.

name: Charlotte Freedom Park Skate Park
description: Charlotte Freedom Park Skate Park is a popular public skatepark in Charlotte, North Carolina. Features bowls, ramps, and a street course for skaters of all ages.

name: Columbus Dodge Skate Park
description: Columbus Dodge Skate Park is a large public outdoor skatepark in Columbus, Ohio. Features 30,000 sq ft of concrete skating terrain including bowls, street sections, and a vert ramp.

name: Minneapolis Webber Skate Park
description: Minneapolis Webber Skate Park is a public outdoor skatepark in Minneapolis, Minnesota. Features a street-style plaza, bowls, and ramps for year-round skating enthusiasts.

name: San Francisco Potrero del Sol Skate Park
description: San Francisco Potrero del Sol Skate Park is a popular public skatepark in the Mission District of San Francisco, California. Features a concrete bowl, mini ramp, and street course.

name: Tucson Reid Park Skate Park
description: Tucson Reid Park Skate Park is a large public outdoor skatepark in Tucson, Arizona. Features 32,000 sq ft of concrete skating terrain including bowls, a street course, and beginner areas.

name: Hudson River Park Skate Park
description: Hudson River Park Skate Park (Pier 62) is a public outdoor skatepark on the Hudson River waterfront in Manhattan, New York. Features bowls, street elements, and stunning river views.

name: Brooklyn Banks Skate Area
description: The Brooklyn Banks is an iconic historic skate spot under the Brooklyn Bridge in Manhattan, New York. One of the most recognized skateboarding locations in the world, featuring brick banks and ledges.

name: Miami Lot 11 Skate Park
description: Miami Lot 11 Skate Park is a popular public outdoor skatepark in Miami, Florida. Features a large concrete bowl, street obstacles, and rails open to all ages and skill levels.

name: San Antonio Southwest Skate Park
description: San Antonio Southwest Skate Park is a public outdoor skatepark in San Antonio, Texas. Features a bowl, street course, and modern concrete obstacles for the local skate community.

name: Sacramento Fremont Skate Park
description: Sacramento Fremont Skate Park is one of Sacramento, California's premier public skateparks. Features 20,000 sq ft of skating terrain including bowls, a street course, and a mini ramp.

name: Nashville Shelby Bottoms Skate Park
description: Nashville Shelby Bottoms Skate Park is a well-designed public skatepark in Shelby Bottoms Greenway, Nashville, Tennessee. Features a street course, bowls, and rails.

name: Kansas City Berkley Riverfront Skate Park
description: Kansas City Berkley Riverfront Skate Park is a 17,500 sq ft public outdoor skatepark on the Missouri River waterfront in Kansas City, Missouri. Features a bowl, street course, and river views.

name: New Orleans City Park Skate Park
description: New Orleans City Park Skate Park is a public outdoor skatepark in City Park, New Orleans, Louisiana. Features a street course, bowls, and ramps for skaters of all skill levels.

name: Indianapolis Pleasant Run Skate Park
description: Indianapolis Pleasant Run Skate Park is a public outdoor skatepark in Indianapolis, Indiana. Features a street course, quarter pipes, and grind rails for local skaters.

name: Detroit Eastern Market Skate Park
description: Detroit Eastern Market Skate Park is a public outdoor skatepark near the Eastern Market district in Detroit, Michigan. Features a bowl, street course, and rails for community skaters.

name: Cincinnati Washington Park Skate Plaza
description: Cincinnati Washington Park Skate Plaza is a public skate plaza in the Over-the-Rhine neighborhood of Cincinnati, Ohio. Features street-style skating terrain with ledges, rails, and banks.

name: Milwaukee McKinley Skate Park
description: Milwaukee McKinley Skate Park is a public outdoor skatepark in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Features a large concrete bowl, street elements, and open skating for all ages.

name: Baltimore Rash Field Skate Park
description: Baltimore Rash Field Skate Park is a public outdoor skatepark on the Inner Harbor waterfront in Baltimore, Maryland. Features a bowl, street course, and stunning harbor views.

name: Richmond Chimborazo Skate Park
description: Richmond Chimborazo Skate Park is a well-loved public outdoor skatepark in Richmond, Virginia. Features a bowl, street elements, and rails in a community park setting.

name: Boston Christian Herter Skate Park
description: Boston Christian Herter Skate Park is a public outdoor skatepark at Christian Herter Park along the Charles River in Boston, Massachusetts. Features a bowl, street course, and river views.

name: Boise Rhodes Skate Park
description: Boise Rhodes Skate Park is a large public outdoor skatepark in Boise, Idaho. One of the best skateparks in the Pacific Northwest featuring 38,000 sq ft of concrete skating terrain.

name: Spokane Riverfront Skate Park
description: Spokane Riverfront Skate Park is a public outdoor skatepark within Riverfront Park in downtown Spokane, Washington. Features a street plaza, bowls, and rails along the Spokane River.

name: Tucson Quincie Douglas Skate Park
description: Tucson Quincie Douglas Skate Park is a neighborhood public skatepark in Tucson, Arizona. Features concrete ramps, rails, and a small bowl for local skaters of all ages.

name: Raleigh Chavis Heights Skate Park
description: Raleigh Chavis Heights Skate Park is a public outdoor skatepark in Raleigh, North Carolina. Features ramps, rails, and bowls in a community park setting accessible to all ages.

name: Pittsburgh Schenley Skate Park
description: Pittsburgh Schenley Skate Park is a public outdoor skatepark in Schenley Park, Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. Features a concrete bowl, street course, and rails in a beautiful park setting.

name: Omaha McFarlane Skate Park
description: Omaha McFarlane Skate Park is a public outdoor skatepark in Omaha, Nebraska. Features 15,000 sq ft of concrete skating terrain including bowls, a street course, and rails.

name: Des Moines Principal Riverwalk Skate Park
description: Des Moines Principal Riverwalk Skate Park is a public outdoor skatepark along the Des Moines River in Des Moines, Iowa. Features concrete bowls, ledges, and a street course.

name: Salt Lake City Fairmont Skate Park
description: Salt Lake City Fairmont Skate Park is a well-maintained public skatepark in Fairmont Park, Salt Lake City, Utah. Features a concrete bowl, street obstacles, and rails.

name: Albuquerque Westside Skate Park
description: Albuquerque Westside Skate Park is a large public outdoor skatepark in Albuquerque, New Mexico. Features a full concrete bowl, street plaza, and quarter pipes for all skill levels.
